name: React
creator: Meta (Jordan Walke)
description: Declarative UI library using a virtual DOM and component model. The most widely used frontend library.

name: Vue.js
creator: Evan You
description: Progressive framework for building UIs with a gentle learning curve and reactive data binding.

name: Angular
creator: Google
description: Opinionated TypeScript-based SPA framework with dependency injection and a full toolchain.

name: Svelte
creator: Rich Harris
description: Compile-time framework that ships no runtime — components become vanilla JS at build time.

name: Next.js
creator: Vercel
description: React meta-framework with SSR, SSG, ISR, and App Router for full-stack web development.

name: Nuxt
creator: Sébastien Chopin
description: Vue meta-framework providing SSR, file-based routing, and auto-imports.

name: SvelteKit
creator: Rich Harris (Vercel)
description: Official Svelte meta-framework with filesystem routing, SSR, and adapter-based deployment.

name: Express
creator: TJ Holowaychuk
description: Minimal and flexible Node.js web framework — the de facto standard for Node HTTP servers.

name: Fastify
creator: Matteo Collina, Tomas Della Vedova
description: High-performance Node.js framework with JSON schema validation and plugin architecture.

name: NestJS
creator: Kamil Myśliwiec
description: Progressive TypeScript framework for building scalable Node.js server-side apps with Angular-inspired DI.

name: Django
creator: Adrian Holovaty, Simon Willison
description: Batteries-included Python web framework with ORM, admin, and auth built in.

name: FastAPI
creator: Sebastián Ramírez
description: Modern, fast API framework based on Python type hints with auto OpenAPI docs.

name: Flask
creator: Armin Ronacher
description: Lightweight Python micro-framework with no ORM or form validation by default.

name: Spring Boot
creator: Pivotal (VMware)
description: Convention-over-configuration Java framework for production-ready microservices.

name: Laravel
creator: Taylor Otwell
description: Elegant PHP framework with expressive ORM (Eloquent), Blade templates, and a rich ecosystem.

name: Ruby on Rails
creator: David Heinemeier Hansson
description: Full-stack framework prioritising convention over configuration and developer happiness.

name: Gin
creator: Manu Mtz Almeida
description: Minimalist Go HTTP framework with a Martini-like API and 40x faster routing.

name: Axum
creator: Tokio team
description: Ergonomic and modular async Rust web framework built on Tokio and Tower.

name: Actix Web
creator: Nikolay Kim
description: Extremely fast Rust actor-based web framework, consistently top of TechEmpower benchmarks.

name: Tailwind CSS
creator: Adam Wathan
description: Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom designs without leaving HTML.

name: Remix
creator: Ryan Florence, Michael Jackson
description: Full-stack React framework focused on web fundamentals, nested routing, and progressive enhancement.

name: Astro
creator: Fred K. Schott
description: Content-driven framework that ships zero JS by default using island architecture.

name: Hono
creator: Yusuke Wada
description: Ultrafast edge-first web framework running on Cloudflare Workers, Deno, Bun, and Node.

name: Phoenix
creator: Chris McCord
description: Productive Elixir web framework for building highly scalable real-time apps with LiveView.

name: PyTorch
creator: Meta AI
description: Dynamic computation graph ML framework dominant in research and increasingly in production.

name: TensorFlow
creator: Google Brain
description: End-to-end ML platform with static and eager execution, Keras API, and TFLite for mobile.
